name: Ham-And-Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yeast, sugar, and warm milk in the bread machine.
2. Add ham pieces, grated Swiss cheese, minced onion, cheddar cheese, paprika, parmesan cheese, mustard, salt, and flour to the bread machine.
3. Select a light crust setting for baking.
4. Press the start button to begin mixing.
5. Allow the dough to rise completely before baking.
